curation_notes: Patch modifies only src/u6m.cpp (1 file). The fix removes the explicit delete[] song_data in the error path of Cu6mPlayer::load() when lzw_decompress fails, leaving deallocation to the destructor ~Cu6mPlayer(). It also adds a delete[] song_data before reallocating to prevent leaks if load() is called twice. CWE-415 (Double Free) maps to use-after-free as the closest valid class since there is no dedicated double-free class. No sibling files share this exact vulnerability pattern.
